scripts.start: pnpm run build && concurrently -k -n dev,electron "pnpm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:4200 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:4200 electron ."
scripts.electron:serve: nodemon --ignore dist --ignore packages --watch packages/backend/src -e ts --exec "pnpm --filter @light-git/backend run build && electron --inspect --remote-debugging-port=9223 ."
scripts.electron:linux: pnpm run build && electron-builder build --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:windows: pnpm run build && electron-builder build --windows --publish never
scripts.electron:mac: pnpm run build && electron-builder build --mac --publish never
scripts.release:linux: pnpm run build && electron-builder build --linux -p always
scripts.release:windows: pnpm run build && electron-builder build --windows -p always
scripts.release:mac: pnpm run build && electron-builder build --mac -p always
scripts.test-node-watch: nodemon --watch testing --watch packages/backend/src/git --watch packages/shared -e ts --exec "pnpm --filter @light-git/backend run build && pnpm run test-node"
scripts.test-node: pnpm --filter @light-git/backend run build && nyc -r lcov -e .ts -x "*.spec.ts" jasmine-ts
